label: TTPLA · clear transmission line
notes: Easy case: a high-contrast transmission line against open sky. The model should produce a clean, well-localised mask. Drop in a TTPLA validation image to populate this slot.

label: TTPLA · cluttered scene
notes: Hard case: cables crossing tree canopy or against textured background. Tests robustness to occlusion and contrast loss.

label: Synthetic LV · parallel street run
notes: Procedural urban-LV scene: a four-span feeder running parallel to a street. The shallow sag exercises the catenary geometry under near-horizontal anchors.

label: Synthetic LV · transformer star
notes: Four catenary cables radiating from a central transformer pole. Demonstrates the visual target the wider project would address; the model is not trained for this domain, so partial recovery is expected.

label: Synthetic LV · long feeder with drops
notes: A multi-span feeder with three building drops. Built to expose the gap between TTPLA's transmission-line training distribution and urban LV imagery.
